location: On a corpse on a stone outcrop attached to the cliffside southwest of Tombsward Catacombs in Weeping Peninsula, reached via a series of drops east, then north, then west and south along the cliff edge.

source.name: Corpse on cliffside ledge, southwest of Tombsward Catacombs

tactics: From the Tombsward Catacombs grace, follow the cliff edge east, then north, then back west and south to the first large broken pillar.
Drop down onto the erdleaf-flower ledge below, then drop again almost due west onto the final stone platform where the corpse sits.
This involves several sequential drops rather than one simple jump — take it slow so you don't overshoot the platform.
lore: A medium metal shield, easier to wield than a kite shield, marked with an eclipsed sun — a symbol tied to the Wandering Mausoleums where soulless demigods lie sleeping.

builds.name: Balanced elemental negation
builds.why: Flat ~44% negation across magic, fire, and holy alongside 100% physical block gives even coverage for a Strength build without one specific elemental threat in mind.
